calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-29-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name - of a Minor
Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: M. Vallejo, Reporter: Karen Farnsworth

Petitioner: Sally Chung, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Stephen Michael Yang, was sworn and examined.

Petitioner's application and order for dispensing notice to the father were summitted in open court, the court grants the application and order is signed.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Stephen Eng Fung.

Decree signed in open court.
